summary: A nearly 8-minute 2019 ICE walkthrough of the South Texas Family Residential Center showing a child walking the campus path, a clothing area stocked with jeans (Boys Y14/Y16), children coloring with crayons, a cafeteria steam-table with rice and pinto beans labeled in English/Spanish, and a library, presenting the detention facility as a humane 'campus' with medical, educational, recreational and dining amenities. Despite a likely-music-driven flag, the audio/music score is low (0.22) and the piece is a slow institutional B-roll facility tour, not a song-driven cinematic spectacle or pop-culture genre experiment. Out of scope: long informational/PR facility walkthrough with no youth-appeal genre styling.
notable_text: Pinto Beans / Frijoles Pintos. BOYS Y14 & Y16. (banner partially reading 'familia').
